Off Calendar Dec-20-2024 Continued To Sep-17-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Compel Binding Arbitration
Off Calendar Nov-25-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Andrew Jung, Esq. QUILL & ARROW LLP (310) 933-4271 ajung@quillarrowlaw.com Attorney for Plaintiff, EILATRA GHASHEH YOUKHANEH
Ali Ameripour. Esq., THETA LAW FIRM, LLP (424) 297-3103 eservice@thetafirm.com Attorney for Defendant Hyundai Motor America

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT HYUNDAI MOTOR AMERICA'S Motion To Compel Binding Arbitration

Granted. The parties' arbitration agreement is valid and enforceable.

Order is signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/HEK)
